name: helixgen
description: Single-plugin marketplace for helixgen — natural-language → Line 6 Helix Stadium preset generation

plugins.name: helixgen
plugins.description: Generate Line 6 Helix Stadium .hsp presets from JSON or natural-language tone descriptions. Bundles the /tone skill and the helixgen MCP server (code bundled, loaded from ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}). Requires the `mcp` and `click` Python packages (`pip install mcp click`).
